# kSecPaddingKey

**Global Variable**

The kind of padding to use.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecPaddingKey: CFString
```

## Discussion

If you do not supply a value for this key, an appropriate value will be supplied for you. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/transform-attributes#Padding-Types] for a list of valid values.
title: kSecPaddingKey
